title: Isolate the trigonometric function
text: Begin by isolating $$\cos(\theta)$$ on one side of the equation, treating it like a variable in an algebraic equation.

title: Unit Circle Values for Cosine
text: Once $$\cos(\theta)$$ is isolated, identify the angle(s) on the unit circle where cosine takes that value within the specified interval $$(0$$, $$2\pi)$$.
